1: The LORD LORD is is my shepherd; I shall not want.
2: He leadeth me beside the still waters.
3: He leadeth me in the paths of righteousness for his name's sake.
4: for thou art art with me; Thy rod and thy staff they comfort me.
5: Thou anointest my head with oil; my cup runneth over.
6: And I will dwell in the house of the LORD LORD for ever.
